Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Mom and Dad just keep fighting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I begged them to stop fighting so much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But... they told me to leave them alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I made up my mind! I have to run away from home![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Why not!? I thought you were on my side...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'm going to run away! I already said so![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}But I made up my mind, and I'm gonna run away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 13 5 110}You mean I can do what I want!? You mean it!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Then I'm running away! I made up my mind![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hey... What should I bring if I'm running away from home?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I need lots of snacks, right? And my... insurance card?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 13 13 15 110}Really? Wow! Running away is easier than I thought![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Now... I just gotta decide when to sneak out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Maybe my PJs, and my toothbrush. Um... Is there more...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko is deep in thought...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Either way, I'm gonna give it a try![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Don't worry, I'll be just fine, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I'm gonna miss playing with you though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko seems fond of me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}When I run away, Mom and Dad will have to work together to find me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I walked Maiko home, then[n]returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
